name: median pitch smoothing (Mauch 2014 pYIN)

vocadito_a1_noff_f1_ge_0.67.note: ablated via scripts/gate_vocadito_conp_phase_g.py --apply g5 on full 40-clip A1

discard_rationale: G-5 alone regresses noff F1 by 0.0132 vs baseline. The 250 ms voiced-only smoothing widens the segmenter's existing 190 ms median further than helpful — pitch transitions get smeared, per-note pitch median shifts outside the 50-cent strict tolerance. The published 250 ms window from Mauch 2014 was tuned against a different segmenter family.
